events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario describes trench protection work that has been tested/inspected. The field condition matches the referenced drawing/manufacturer sheet, tags/ratings/layout callouts line up, revision block is current, and reference material is OSHA 1926 Subpart P. No defects or hazards are flagged. This appears to be a passing condition.
